name: Pumpkin Pecan Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 (8 oz.) packages cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. For the topping: In a small bowl, mix together the brown sugar and softened butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Stir in the chopped pecans.
2. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
3. Mix graham cracker crumbs with 1/4 cup granulated sugar and melted butter in a medium bowl. Press this mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan, up the sides, and chill.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add the remaining brown sugar and continue beating. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in pumpkin puree, whipping cream, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared crust.
6. Bake for 1 hour 30 minutes, or until the center is set and no longer jiggles when the pan is shaken.
7. Sprinkle the topping over the cheesecake.
8. Bake for an additional 15 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a rack. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight. The cheesecake can be prepared up to 2 days in advance.
